objective: Preserve an unused integration lease across unrelated main drift and permit a closed corrective PR to renew only the content-addressed lease identity, base, and manifest reference without changing any authorization boundary.
claim_ceiling: Accepted D13 E0 offline delivery-governance behavior only: an unused integration lease may survive unrelated ancestor drift only while every leased path remains unchanged, and a closed done-to-done corrective PR may renew only its content-addressed lease identity, exact PR base, and manifest hash while every authorization boundary remains identical. Gate 0 v7 remains frozen and blocked v8 preserves every accepted artifact, attestation, blocker, and readiness state. This does not authorize broader lease lifecycle, application, data, factor, backtest, release, or Production behavior.

requirements: the queued D13 registration is merged to main before preparation freezes the activation base, reviewer, corpus, and integration lease
a lease acquisition base must be an ancestor of the exact PR base
every leased path must remain unchanged from the acquisition base through the exact PR base
unrelated main drift may preserve lease identity only when owner, state, expiry, leased paths, dependencies, and authorization paths remain valid

a closed done-to-done corrective PR may renew only lease_id, base_sha, and the content-addressed lease reference when batch identity, owner, state, expiry, leased paths, and every other path authorization field remain identical to the accepted base
non-ancestor anchors, leased-path drift, overlap, expiry, revocation, owner/path expansion, and malformed leases remain fail-closed

later_claim_dependencies: Accepted D13 E0 permits D12 corrective PR #304 to renew only its exact content-addressed lease; it does not itself repair or accept D12.
Transferred, released, and automatic lease lifecycle states plus root-export redesign remain later #248 work.

Any closed-corrective change beyond a content-addressed lease renewal with identical authorization boundaries, plus any application, data, factor, backtest, release, or Production change, requires separate authorization.

corpus.environment: Local/CI git-history and lease fixtures only
required_strata: lease acquisition base equals the exact PR base
lease acquisition base is an ancestor and only unrelated paths changed
a leased file changed between acquisition and PR base
an ancestor leased file was deleted or renamed before PR base
lease acquisition base is not an ancestor or is unavailable
closed done-to-done corrective lease renewal changes only lease identity, base, and manifest reference
closed corrective lease renewal attempts to change owner, state, expiry, leased paths, or another path authorization field
overlap, expiry, revoked state, owner mismatch, path expansion, and malformed lease remain rejected

source_ceiling: Local git history and checked-in governance artifacts only; no network source, credential, database, object-store, scheduler, runtime, release, consumer, or Production operation is authorized.

release_activation.reason: D13 changes offline repository lease validation only and cannot activate a source, runtime, schedule, consumer, release, or data flow.

negative_controls: accepting a non-ancestor or unavailable lease acquisition base
accepting any leased-path content, deletion, rename, or mode drift between acquisition and PR base
accepting a closed corrective lease renewal that changes batch identity, owner, state, expiry, leased paths, or any path authorization field
accepting overlap, expiry, revoked state, owner mismatch, path expansion, malformed identity, or stale dependency authorization
weakening closed-corrective behavior beyond the exact content-addressed lease renewal, issue lifecycle, exact-head evidence, or review requirements
changing application, data, factor, backtest, release, database, consumer, or Production behavior

allowed_evidence_readers: D12 corrective PR #304 lease renewal and repository delivery-governance validation only; no broader lease lifecycle or runtime authorization

invalidation: Changing ancestor policy, leased-path drift detection, git object handling, corrective lease-renewal equality, lease identity, overlap, expiry, state, owner, path, dependency, or corpus semantics requires a new prepared revision before implementation.

Any attempt to modify closed-corrective behavior beyond the exact content-addressed lease renewal, application, data, factor, backtest, release, database, consumer, or Production behavior requires separate authorization.
rollback: Revert only the D13 lease-validation predicate, tests, Gate 0 successor, evidence, and lease; do not mutate D12, historical Actions evidence, application, data, factor, backtest, release, or Production state.
